scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/shared-types run build && npm --prefix packages/webrtc-client run build && npm --prefix packages/ui run build && npm --prefix packages/config run build && npm --prefix apps/gateway run build && npm --prefix apps/signaling run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/shared-types run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/webrtc-client run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/ui run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/config run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/gateway run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/signaling run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck
